education.details:
Published Research: [Last Name], [First Initial]. (2018). Love in the Flesh, Toni Morrison and Hortense Spillers 30 years after Beloved and Mama’s Baby, Papa’s Maybe. Alpenglow: Binghamton University Undergraduate Journal of Research and Creative Activity, 4(1). Retrieved from https://orb.binghamton.edu/alpenglowjournal/vol4/iss1/4
Conference Presentations: [Last Name], [First Initial]. (2018). Plantation Ecologies: mapping world-ecological transformations in Sugar and Cotton slavery from 1700-1860. Paper presented at Sixth Biennial Sociology Graduate Student Conference in Binghamton, NY. Presented as poster at Institute for the Advanced Studies in the Humanities symposium in Binghamton, NY.

bullets: Directed end-to-end **research projects**, overseeing the execution of quantitative and qualitative studies to inform strategic decision-making and product development, coordinating timelines and budgets to ensure high-quality outcomes and **streamlined workflows** using Monday.com.

Leveraged LinkedIn Sales Navigator to implement strategic outreach and engagement workflows, identifying and nurturing key stakeholders to support product adoption and market intelligence initiatives.

Chaired the Process and Optimization Committee, utilizing Salesforce to implement **streamlined operations**, enhance organizational effectiveness through efficient **database management**, and transform existing workflows for improved efficiency.

experience.company: Alfred E. Smith CTE High School
bullets: Developed and delivered structured educational content for English and History classes, demonstrating adaptable instructional design and clear communication of complex subjects.

Coordinated cross-functional teams (sales, maintenance) to optimize user onboarding workflows, contributing to occupancy rates exceeding the market standard 95% threshold and enhancing overall user experience.
